## Screenshots or Recordings

## Patient-Facing UX Check

- [ ] No long explanatory text was added to the patient-facing main flow.
- [ ] Touch targets remain large enough for mobile use.
- [ ] Emergency help, playback overlays, and expression flows stay simple and picture-first.
- [ ] Mobile layout was checked for crowded text, small buttons, or overlapping controls.
